name: Architecture View
description: VS Code WebviewView sidebar panel ("Architecture") that renders the architecture wiki as a searchable list of component cards. Hosts the shared @code-workbench/ui ArchPanel React component and answers its RPC calls (list/upsert/remove/openCard/search) against the repo's .code-workbench/.arch/<slug>.json cards — the SAME store the bundled arch MCP server (arch-server.mjs) reads and writes, so cards Claude authors via seed-arch/arch_upsert and cards edited in the panel are one and the same files. Clicking a card opens its <slug>.json file in the normal editor (openCard RPC → showTextDocument); there is no in-webview graph, card-detail, or editor form. The RPC handler set is built by buildArchRpcHandlers(ctx, getRepoRoot) exported from archView.ts and shared with the full-page board (archPage.ts). ArchViewProvider takes an optional onCardsChanged callback (wired to refreshArchPage) so its .arch file watcher refreshes BOTH the sidebar and the open page. Originally ported from the removed Electron app's ArchWikiPane; the force-directed ArchGraph and the in-webview CardEditor form were later removed.
guidelines: RPC handlers live in buildArchRpcHandlers(ctx, getRepoRoot) in archView.ts — reuse it in both the sidebar provider and archPage; do not duplicate the list/upsert/remove/openCard/search bodies.
The full-width board is codeWorkbench.arch.openAsPage (archPage.ts showArchPage), mirroring codeWorkbench.tasks.openAsPage; it reuses the same webview/arch.tsx bundle.
ArchPanel semantic search is gated on api.search being wired; the sidebar and page both pass it, so semantic ranking is available in both surfaces.
anti_patterns: Don't re-sort the card list in ListView when semantic ranking is active — pass preserveOrder so the embedding order survives.
Don't treat an empty api.search result as 'no matches' — [] means the embedding model is unavailable, and the panel must fall back to substring filtering.
decisions: The Architecture panel was ported from the removed Electron app's ArchWikiPane into the shared ui package so it renders identically; the Electron useArchWiki/window.api hook was replaced by an injected ArchApi adapter wired over the webview postMessage RPC bridge (webviewRpc.ts / bridge.ts).
The force-directed ArchGraph nodes view was removed; the panel is now a search + list only.

The in-webview CardEditor form was removed (commit f04702d, feat: add openCard). Cards are now edited by opening their <slug>.json file in the normal editor via the openCard RPC; the old openFile RPC and the read-only detail pane were dropped with it.
Live refresh uses a VS Code FileSystemWatcher instead of the Electron app's chokidar + coalesce watcher; event debouncing is delegated to VS Code's watcher.
